cells.xml_text_content: Note: The Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) and the Special Supplemental Nutrition Program for Women, Infants, and Children (WIC) purchases are included under Government final purchaser estimates. Food-at-home final purchasers include only households and Government; whereas food-away-from-home final purchasers include households, Government, and businesses. See the USDA, Economic Research Service (ERS) report, Measuring the Value of the U.S. Food System: Revisions to the Food Expenditure Series (2018) and the Food Expenditure Series Documentation page for more details.
cells.pdf_text_content: Note: The Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) and the Special Supplemental Nutrition Program for Women, Infants, and Children (WIC) purchases are included under Government final purchaser estimates. Food-at-home final purchasers include only households and Government; whereas food-away-from-home final purchasers include households, Government, and businesses. See the USDA, Economic Research Service (ERS) report, Measuring the Value of the U.S. Food System: Revisions to the Food Expenditure Series (2018) and the Food Expenditure Series Documentation page for more details.

cells.xml_text_content: Source: Calculated by USDA, ERS from various sources, June 3, 2024.
cells.pdf_text_content: Source: Calculated by USDA, ERS from various sources, June 3, 2024.
